description: Boundary-condition reference topics for FLAC model setup. These topics summarize common command keyword families and when to use them.

items.name: mechanical-face
items.description: Mechanical face boundary conditions with 'zone face apply': stresses, velocities, reactions, and local/global components.
items.common_use: Apply stress or velocity constraints to model boundaries selected by face groups or ranges.

items.name: gridpoint-fixity
items.description: Gridpoint-level fixed/free conditions for velocity, force, pore pressure, temperature, and well flow.
items.common_use: Set constraints directly on gridpoints when face apply logic is not appropriate.

items.name: fluid-flow
items.description: Fluid-flow boundary condition keywords for pore pressure, discharge, leakage, head, and wells.
items.common_use: Configure coupled or flow-only groundwater boundary conditions.

items.name: thermal-dynamic
items.description: Thermal and dynamic boundary-condition keywords including temperature, flux, convection, quiet boundaries, and acceleration.
items.common_use: Configure thermal transfer, dynamic shaking, and absorbing boundaries.

items.name: apply-modifiers
items.description: Modifiers used after a 'zone face apply' condition value: gradient, fish, table, servo, symmetry, and local variation.
items.common_use: Vary a boundary condition in space, time, or by convergence response.
